stock_uncle_insight.date_header: 7/8 法人與主力大戶主要買超股票

buyer_groups.group_title: 1. 外資大戶：狂掃金融與航空，面板雙虎倒貨不手軟

stocks.description: 肖年仔你看，外資大戶一口氣狂掃台新新光金近 2.96 萬張，擺明就是看好金融股的避險跟高殖利率題材，這不是黑白買的啦！
凱基金也被外資買超近 2.60 萬張，跟台新新光金一樣，都是外資在金融股裡頭找安全感，順便卡位下半年行情。
國泰金也沒漏掉，外資買超近 1.70 萬張。這些金控股就是外資的資金避風港，肖年仔別傻傻去接刀那些被倒貨的股票。
長榮航被外資買超近 1.48 萬張，這就是解封題材的延續，肖年仔，航空股有夢最美，但也要小心高檔拉高出貨的風險。
力積電外資買超近 1.00 萬張，但自營商卻在賣，這擺明就是法人之間在對作，肖年仔別看到外資買就黑白衝，搞不好是假外資在玩短線。

buyer_groups.group_title: 2. 投信大戶（本土國家隊）：作帳行情啟動，防禦性電信也入袋

stocks.description: 兆豐金被投信狂買近 1.50 萬張，這就是國家隊在作帳啦！把績優金控股拉起來，讓基金淨值好看，肖年仔，這招你學起來。
第一金也被投信買超近 0.77 萬張，跟兆豐金一樣，都是投信的作帳標的。但肖年仔要注意，投信在其他金控股卻是賣超，這叫換股操作。
佳世達被投信買超近 0.71 萬張，這檔電子股在投信的買超榜上算突出，可能是有特定題材或低基期被看上。
遠傳被投信買超近 0.63 萬張，電信股就是防禦性資產，市場不穩的時候，資金就會往這些穩健的標的跑，肖年仔，這叫避險。
長榮航投信也買超近 0.63 萬張，跟外資英雄所見略同，解封題材還是有吸引力，但肖年仔，漲多就是最大的利空，要小心隔日沖倒貨。

buyer_groups.group_title: 3. 內資主力與實戶：短線避險與特定題材點火

stocks.description: 自營商買超三商壽近 0.24 萬張，這檔壽險股被自營商點火，通常是短線題材或權證避險盤的動作，肖年仔別以為是長線布局。
元大台灣50被自營商買超近 0.13 萬張，但外資卻是大賣，這就是自營商在做避險操作，或是短線對沖，肖年仔，這不是叫你跟著買的。
長榮航自營商也買超近 0.07 萬張，三大法人都買航空股，這股熱潮還在，但肖年仔，追高要小心，主力隨時會拉高出貨。
中磊被自營商買超近 0.05 萬張，網通股最近也有些零星買盤，可能是特定題材或小型股輪動，肖年仔，這種小咖的動向要多觀察。

strategies.strategy_title: 策略一：資金大挪移，從景氣循環股撤退至防禦性金融與解封概念
strategies.strategy_content: 肖年仔你看，外資跟自營商不約而同地大賣面板雙虎（群創、友達），還有聯電、華邦電這些半導體，這擺明就是對景氣循環股的後市不看好，尤其面板業庫存壓力山大，記憶體晶片雖然說要漲價，但新聞也說消費者不買單，需求疲軟是事實。這些資金跑去哪？全部湧進金融股（台新新光金、凱基金、國泰金、兆豐金）跟航空股（長榮航），這就是大戶在找避風港，金融股有高殖利率跟升息預期撐腰，航空股則有解封題材，肖年仔，這叫高檔避險，別傻傻去接刀。

strategies.strategy_title: 策略二：投信國家隊作帳行情，防禦性電信股卡位
strategies.strategy_content: 投信這幫國家隊，買超兆豐金、第一金，這就是典型的作帳行情，把基金持有的績優股拉抬一下，讓季底或年底的淨值好看。同時也買進遠傳、台灣大這些電信股，肖年仔，電信股就是穩，股性牛皮但抗跌，在市場震盪的時候，就是資金的避風港，這也是一種防禦性布局。但肖年仔要注意，投信在金融股上跟外資有對作，這表示他們內部也在調整持股，不是全面看好。

strategies.strategy_title: 策略三：短線主力與避險盤的權證大戰與隔日沖
strategies.strategy_content: 自營商買超三商壽、元大台灣50，同時賣超群創、聯電、力積電，這就是典型的短線操作跟避險盤。肖年仔，自營商很多時候是為了權證或權利金在做對沖，他們的買賣動作很難說代表對基本面的看法。你看凱基台北這種隔日沖大戶也買三商壽，這就更印證了短線炒作的意圖。肖年仔，這種股票你追進去，隔天可能就被倒貨，小心割韭菜！

stock_uncle_insight.summary: 肖年仔，今天大戶們的動作很明顯，資金從景氣循環股大撤退，轉進金融、航空、電信這些防禦性或有特定題材的板塊避險兼作帳，面板跟部分半導體被倒貨倒得兇，別傻傻去接刀，追高殺低是韭菜的宿命！

top_brokerages_analysis.action: 買超台新新光金 1.04 萬張
top_brokerages_analysis.uncle_logic: 美商高盛這種外資大咖，一口氣買超台新新光金這麼多，這不是避險那麼簡單，擺明就是看好金融股下半年的獲利或有特定題材，準備鎖碼波段，肖年仔，這叫真外資，不是假外資。
凱基台北這種著名的短線隔日沖分點，買三商壽這種壽險股，通常是看短線題材或隔日沖套利，隔天高機率會倒貨，肖年仔，這就是標準的割韭菜手法，你追進去就準備被套！
元大投信這種國家隊在買兆豐金，這就是典型的作帳行情，把績優金控股拉起來，讓基金淨值好看，肖年仔，這叫拉抬，但也要注意作帳結束後的賣壓。
摩根大通這種外資大咖狂倒群創，結合外資整體大賣面板，擺明就是看壞面板後市，準備拉高出貨或直接砍倉，肖年仔，面板雙虎現在就是燙手山芋，別去接刀！

english_professor_news.title: Best Buy and Apple flag a price shock for shoppers

level1_blind.text:
「Unfortunately, price increases are unavoidable,」 he told The Wall Street Journal. 「We're doing everything we can to mitigate the huge increases being passed on to us.」
The problem is a global shortage of memory chips. These components, known as DRAM (memory) and NAND (storage), are inside nearly every computing device sold today.
It's a situation that means higher prices, not just for Apple, but for consumers across the board. Normally, that would push consumers to stock up before prices increase, but that's not what's happening, according to Best Buy's outgoing CEO Corie Barry.
Traditionally, when people know that price increases are coming, that leads to at least some consumers buying ahead to meet future needs.
「In our research around the consumer. We are not seeing any indicators that would say the customer is pulling forward purchases,」 she said during Best Buy's first-quarter earnings call.
Barry noted that the upcoming price increases, something that will hit pretty much any product that uses memory, unless the manufacturer opts to eat higher costs, have not impacted customer purchases.
「And in fact, very few really are worried about 「memory」, as I say, in air quotes. And we've been keeping a really tight eye on this. So I think, again, I said it, we continue to see very consistent customer behavior, which is a customer that's under a little more pressure, but still resilient, attracted to deals and sales moments, shopping within their budget,」 she added.
A few months ago, I ordered a hot tub because it was being offered at a lower price than I had seen before. We hadn't moved into the house where the spa is located, but spending the money now meant saving close to $1,000 rather than pushing the purchase down the road.

level2_keywords.example: 「The company warned of significant price increases due to supply chain disruptions.」
「A global shortage of semiconductors has impacted various industries.」
「The production of smartphones relies heavily on a stable supply of memory chips.」
「During the recent earnings call, the CEO discussed future growth strategies.」
「Despite economic headwinds, consumer spending remained surprisingly resilient.」

english_professor_news.level2_context:
各位同學，這篇新聞主要在探討電子產品價格上漲的議題。起因是全球性的記憶體晶片短缺，包括DRAM和NAND等關鍵零組件供應吃緊，這直接導致了製造成本的增加。像蘋果和百思買（Best Buy）這類科技零售商和品牌商，面臨著不得不將這些成本轉嫁給消費者的壓力。

有趣的是，儘管預期價格會上漲，但百思買的數據顯示，消費者並沒有像傳統預期那樣提前囤貨。這反映出當前消費者可能面臨更大的預算壓力，儘管他們對優惠和促銷活動仍有興趣，但整體消費行為趨於謹慎，更傾向於在預算內購物。這對科技產業來說，意味著即使產品成本上升，廠商在定價和促銷策略上仍需謹慎，以避免進一步抑制消費需求。

level3_translation.sentence: 「Unfortunately, price increases are unavoidable,」 he told The Wall Street Journal.
level3_translation.translation: 「很不幸地，價格上漲是無法避免的，」他向『華爾街日報』表示。

level3_translation.sentence: 「We're doing everything we can to mitigate the huge increases being passed on to us.」
level3_translation.translation: 「我們正在竭盡所能，來緩解這些轉嫁到我們身上的巨大成本增幅。」

level3_translation.sentence: The problem is a global shortage of memory chips.
level3_translation.translation: 問題出在記憶體晶片的全球性短缺。

level3_translation.sentence: These components, known as DRAM (memory) and NAND (storage), are inside nearly every computing device sold today.
level3_translation.translation: 這些零組件，也就是我們熟知的DRAM（記憶體）和NAND（儲存），幾乎存在於現今所有銷售的運算裝置中。

level3_translation.sentence: It's a situation that means higher prices, not just for Apple, but for consumers across the board.
level3_translation.translation: 這種情況意味著不僅是蘋果，而是所有消費者都將面臨更高的價格。

level3_translation.sentence: Normally, that would push consumers to stock up before prices increase, but that's not what's happening, according to Best Buy's outgoing CEO Corie Barry.
level3_translation.translation: 通常來說，這會促使消費者在價格上漲前囤貨，但根據百思買即將卸任的執行長Corie Barry的說法，目前情況並非如此。

level3_translation.sentence: Traditionally, when people know that price increases are coming, that leads to at least some consumers buying ahead to meet future needs.
level3_translation.translation: 傳統上，當人們知道價格即將上漲時，至少會有一些消費者提前購買以滿足未來需求。

level3_translation.sentence: 「In our research around the consumer.
level3_translation.translation: 「在我們針對消費者的研究中，

level3_translation.sentence: We are not seeing any indicators that would say the customer is pulling forward purchases,」 she said during Best Buy's first-quarter earnings call.
level3_translation.translation: 我們沒有看到任何跡象表明顧客正在提前購買，」她在百思買的第一季度財報電話會議上表示。

level3_translation.sentence: Barry noted that the upcoming price increases, something that will hit pretty much any product that uses memory, unless the manufacturer opts to eat higher costs, have not impacted customer purchases.
level3_translation.translation: Barry指出，即將到來的價格上漲——這幾乎會影響所有使用記憶體的產品，除非製造商選擇自行吸收更高的成本——並未影響顧客的購買行為。

level3_translation.sentence: 「And in fact, very few really are worried about 「memory」, as I say, in air quotes.
level3_translation.translation: 「事實上，很少有人真正『擔心』記憶體（我用引號表示）。

level3_translation.sentence: And we've been keeping a really tight eye on this.
level3_translation.translation: 我們一直密切關注著這一點。

level3_translation.sentence: So I think, again, I said it, we continue to see very consistent customer behavior, which is a customer that's under a little more pressure, but still resilient, attracted to deals and sales moments, shopping within their budget,」 she added.
level3_translation.translation: 所以我想，我再說一次，我們持續看到非常一致的顧客行為，那就是顧客雖然承受著一些壓力，但仍然具有韌性，會被優惠和促銷活動吸引，並在預算內購物，」她補充道。

level3_translation.sentence: A few months ago, I ordered a hot tub because it was being offered at a lower price than I had seen before.
level3_translation.translation: 幾個月前，我訂購了一個熱水浴缸，因為它的價格比我之前看到的還要低。

level3_translation.sentence: We hadn't moved into the house where the spa is located, but spending the money now meant saving close to $1,000 rather than pushing the purchase down the road.
level3_translation.translation: 我們當時還沒有搬進那個設有水療浴缸的房子，但現在花錢意味著可以省下將近1,000美元，而不是把購買計畫延後。

english_professor_news.title: Is Costco Wholesale Corporation (COST) a Durable Long-Term Compounder?

level1_blind.text:
RiverPark Advisors, an investment advisory firm and sponsor of the RiverPark family of mutual funds, released its "RiverPark Large Growth Fund" Q1 2026 investor letter. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. The US stock market declined in the quarter with the S&P 500 index ("S&P") and the Russell 1000 Growth index ("RLG") falling 4.33% and 9.78%, respectively. Markets started the year positively but became volatile mainly due to increased tensions with Iran. The Federal Reserve kept rates unchanged in January and February. Still, rising energy prices and weaker economic data sparked concerns about stagflation, leading investors to rethink the timing and scale of future rate cuts. Investor sentiment shifted from growth and tech stocks amid inflation, interest rate, and supply chain concerns. Opposing AI-driven rotations heavily influenced investor sentiment, affecting growth stocks—enthusiasm grew for semiconductor firms linked to AI infrastructure spending, while enterprise software companies, viewed as vulnerable to AI disruption, faced pessimism. The Fund's software holdings were sold off heavily, while the underweight in semiconductor companies, which benefited most from AI infrastructure spending, affected the performance. Despite challenges, the firm remains confident in the long-term prospects and valuations of its portfolio companies. Please review the Fund's top five holdings to gain insights into their key selections for 2026.

In its first-quarter 2026 investor letter, RiverPark Large Growth Fund highlighted Costco Wholesale Corporation (NASDAQ:COST) as a leading contributor. Costco Wholesale Corporation (NASDAQ:COST) is a leading US based multinational retailer specializes in the operation of membership-only warehouses. On July 2, 2026, Costco Wholesale Corporation (NASDAQ:COST) closed at $951.67 per share, reflecting a market capitalization of $422.05 billion. Costco Wholesale Corporation (NASDAQ:COST) posted a one-month return of -2.08%, and its shares lost 3.58% over the past 52 weeks.

RiverPark Large Growth Fund stated the following regarding Costco Wholesale Corporation (NASDAQ:COST) in its Q1 2026 investor letter:

"Costco Wholesale Corporation (NASDAQ:COST): COST was the third-largest contributor for the quarter, gaining 16% as the company benefited from two distinct tailwinds. In the first two months of the quarter, Costco's consistent, membership-driven business model provided a defensive haven as investors rotated away from high-multiple technology stocks amid capex cycle concerns. Then in March, as the Iran conflict drove consumers toward value-seeking behavior, Costco's warehouse model and unmatched value proposition attracted incremental traffic. Comparable store sales growth remained in the mid-to-high single digits year-over-year, membership renewal rates remained above 90%, and e-commerce penetration continued to accelerate. The company's ability to compound through a variety of macro environments reinforced its status as one of the highest quality retailers globally.

We continue to view Costco as one of the most resilient and defensible businesses in the consumer sector. Its membership flywheel, strong private-label offering, and disciplined pricing strategy support consistent traffic and recurring revenue across economic cycles. With steady international expansion, industry-leading capital returns, and a loyal membership base that is difficult to disintermediate, Costco remains a durable long-term compounder."

Costco Wholesale Corporation (NASDAQ:COST) is not on our list of 40 Most Popular Stocks Among Hedge Funds Heading Into 2026. According to our database, 107 hedge fund portfolios held Costco Wholesale Corporation (NASDAQ:COST) at the end of the first quarter, up from 106 in the previous quarter. While we acknowledge the potential of Costco Wholesale Corporation (NASDAQ:COST) as an investment, we believe certain AI stocks offer greater upside potential and carry less downside risk. If you're looking for an extremely undervalued AI stock that also stands to benefit significantly from Trump-era tariffs and the onshoring trend, see our free report on the best short-term AI stock.

In another article, we covered Costco Wholesale Corporation (NASDAQ:COST) and shared the list of best stocks to buy according to billionaire Richard Chilton. In addition, please check out our hedge fund investor letters Q1 2026 page for more investor letters from hedge funds and other leading investors.

level2_keywords.meaning: 指那些能長期穩定地將獲利再投資，並產生複利成長的公司，是長期投資者青睞的標的。
level2_keywords.example: 『Costco's consistent business model reinforces its status as a durable long-term compounder.』

level2_keywords.meaning: 指對企業或經濟體有利的外部因素或趨勢，能推動其成長或表現。
level2_keywords.example: 『Costco benefited from two distinct tailwinds, including its membership-driven model and value proposition.』

level2_keywords.meaning: 在市場波動或經濟不確定時，投資者會轉向這類資產或公司，尋求相對穩定的避險標的。
level2_keywords.example: 『Costco's membership-driven business model provided a defensive haven as investors rotated away from high-multiple tech stocks.』

level2_keywords.meaning: 電子商務在特定市場或產業中被採用的程度，通常以線上銷售佔總銷售的比例來衡量。
level2_keywords.example: 『E-commerce penetration continued to accelerate, showing Costco's adaptability to digital trends.』

english_professor_news.level2_context: 各位同學，這篇新聞來自一家投資顧問公司的季度投資者信函，主要探討了2026年第一季的市場表現與其投資組合。當時美國股市整體下跌，特別是成長股表現不佳，原因包括與伊朗的地緣政治緊張、聯準會利率按兵不動、能源價格上漲導致的停滯性通膨擔憂，以及投資人對AI產業的看法分歧（半導體受惠於AI基礎建設支出而上漲，但企業軟體公司則因AI顛覆性影響而面臨壓力）。在這種市場輪動下，投資人從高估值的科技成長股轉向更具防禦性的價值型股票。好市多（Costco）正是在此背景下被該基金視為一個亮點，因為其會員制商業模式、強大的價值主張以及在各種宏觀環境下仍能穩定成長的能力，使其成為市場波動中的『防禦性避風港』和『長期複利成長型公司』。這篇文章旨在說明，即使在充滿挑戰的市場環境中，某些具備核心競爭力的零售巨頭仍能展現其韌性與投資價值。

level3_translation.sentence: RiverPark Advisors, an investment advisory firm and sponsor of the RiverPark family of mutual funds, released its "RiverPark Large Growth Fund" Q1 2026 investor letter.
level3_translation.translation: RiverPark Advisors這家投資顧問公司，同時也是RiverPark系列共同基金的發起人，發布了其『RiverPark大型成長基金』2026年第一季的投資者信函。

level3_translation.sentence: A copy of the letter can be downloaded here.
level3_translation.translation: 這份信函的副本可以在這裡下載。

level3_translation.sentence: The US stock market declined in the quarter with the S&P 500 index ("S&P") and the Russell 1000 Growth index ("RLG") falling 4.33% and 9.78%, respectively.
level3_translation.translation: 本季度美國股市呈現下跌，其中標準普爾500指數（『S&P』）下跌4.33%，而羅素1000成長指數（『RLG』）則下跌了9.78%。

level3_translation.sentence: Markets started the year positively but became volatile mainly due to increased tensions with Iran.
level3_translation.translation: 市場年初表現積極，但主要因為與伊朗的緊張關係加劇而變得波動不安。

level3_translation.sentence: The Federal Reserve kept rates unchanged in January and February.
level3_translation.translation: 聯準會在一月和二月維持利率不變。

level3_translation.sentence: Still, rising energy prices and weaker economic data sparked concerns about stagflation, leading investors to rethink the timing and scale of future rate cuts.
level3_translation.translation: 然而，能源價格上漲和疲軟的經濟數據引發了對停滯性通膨的擔憂，促使投資者重新評估未來降息的時機和幅度。

level3_translation.sentence: Investor sentiment shifted from growth and tech stocks amid inflation, interest rate, and supply chain concerns.
level3_translation.translation: 在通膨、利率和供應鏈問題的影響下，投資者情緒從成長股和科技股轉移。

level3_translation.sentence: Opposing AI-driven rotations heavily influenced investor sentiment, affecting growth stocks—enthusiasm grew for semiconductor firms linked to AI infrastructure spending, while enterprise software companies, viewed as vulnerable to AI disruption, faced pessimism.
level3_translation.translation: 由AI驅動的市場輪動對投資者情緒產生了巨大影響，進而衝擊了成長股——與AI基礎建設支出相關的半導體公司獲得了熱情追捧，而那些被視為容易受到AI顛覆的企業軟體公司則面臨悲觀情緒。

level3_translation.sentence: The Fund's software holdings were sold off heavily, while the underweight in semiconductor companies, which benefited most from AI infrastructure spending, affected the performance.
level3_translation.translation: 該基金的軟體持股遭到大量拋售，而對半導體公司（這些公司從AI基礎建設支出中獲益最多）的低配則影響了基金的整體表現。

level3_translation.sentence: Despite challenges, the firm remains confident in the long-term prospects and valuations of its portfolio companies.
level3_translation.translation: 儘管面臨挑戰，該公司對其投資組合中各公司的長期前景和估值仍抱持信心。

level3_translation.sentence: Please review the Fund's top five holdings to gain insights into their key selections for 2026.
level3_translation.translation: 請查閱該基金的前五大持股，以深入了解他們在2026年的主要選擇。

level3_translation.sentence: In its first-quarter 2026 investor letter, RiverPark Large Growth Fund highlighted Costco Wholesale Corporation (NASDAQ:COST) as a leading contributor.
level3_translation.translation: 在其2026年第一季的投資者信函中，RiverPark大型成長基金特別點名好市多（Costco Wholesale Corporation, NASDAQ:COST）為主要的貢獻者。

level3_translation.sentence: Costco Wholesale Corporation (NASDAQ:COST) is a leading US based multinational retailer specializes in the operation of membership-only warehouses.
level3_translation.translation: 好市多（Costco Wholesale Corporation, NASDAQ:COST）是一家領先的美國跨國零售商，專門經營會員制的倉儲式賣場。

level3_translation.sentence: On July 2, 2026, Costco Wholesale Corporation (NASDAQ:COST) closed at $951.67 per share, reflecting a market capitalization of $422.05 billion.
level3_translation.translation: 2026年7月2日，好市多（Costco Wholesale Corporation, NASDAQ:COST）收盤價為每股951.67美元，市值達到4220.5億美元。

level3_translation.sentence: Costco Wholesale Corporation (NASDAQ:COST) posted a one-month return of -2.08%, and its shares lost 3.58% over the past 52 weeks.
level3_translation.translation: 好市多（Costco Wholesale Corporation, NASDAQ:COST）的月報酬率為負2.08%，其股價在過去52週內下跌了3.58%。

level3_translation.sentence: RiverPark Large Growth Fund stated the following regarding Costco Wholesale Corporation (NASDAQ:COST) in its Q1 2026 investor letter:
level3_translation.translation: RiverPark大型成長基金在其2026年第一季投資者信函中，針對好市多（Costco Wholesale Corporation, NASDAQ:COST）發表了以下看法：

level3_translation.sentence: "Costco Wholesale Corporation (NASDAQ:COST): COST was the third-largest contributor for the quarter, gaining 16% as the company benefited from two distinct tailwinds.
level3_translation.translation: 『好市多（Costco Wholesale Corporation, NASDAQ:COST）：好市多是本季度第三大貢獻者，股價上漲16%，主要受惠於兩股明顯的利好因素。』

level3_translation.sentence: In the first two months of the quarter, Costco's consistent, membership-driven business model provided a defensive haven as investors rotated away from high-multiple technology stocks amid capex cycle concerns.
level3_translation.translation: 『在本季度的前兩個月，好市多穩定且由會員驅動的商業模式，在投資者因資本支出週期擔憂而從高本益比科技股撤離時，提供了一個防禦性的避風港。』

level3_translation.sentence: Then in March, as the Iran conflict drove consumers toward value-seeking behavior, Costco's warehouse model and unmatched value proposition attracted incremental traffic.
level3_translation.translation: 『接著在三月，隨著伊朗衝突促使消費者轉向追求性價比的消費行為，好市多的倉儲式賣場模式及其無與倫比的價值主張，吸引了更多客流量。』

level3_translation.sentence: Comparable store sales growth remained in the mid-to-high single digits year-over-year, membership renewal rates remained above 90%, and e-commerce penetration continued to accelerate.
level3_translation.translation: 『同店銷售成長率維持在年增中高個位數，會員續約率保持在90%以上，且電商滲透率持續加速成長。』

level3_translation.sentence: The company's ability to compound through a variety of macro environments reinforced its status as one of the highest quality retailers globally.
level3_translation.translation: 『該公司在各種宏觀經濟環境下仍能實現複利成長的能力，鞏固了其作為全球最高品質零售商之一的地位。』

level3_translation.sentence: We continue to view Costco as one of the most resilient and defensible businesses in the consumer sector.
level3_translation.translation: 我們持續將好市多視為消費產業中最具韌性且防禦性最強的企業之一。

level3_translation.sentence: Its membership flywheel, strong private-label offering, and disciplined pricing strategy support consistent traffic and recurring revenue across economic cycles.
level3_translation.translation: 其會員飛輪效應、強大的自有品牌產品，以及嚴謹的定價策略，在各種經濟週期中都能支撐穩定的客流量和經常性收入。

level3_translation.sentence: With steady international expansion, industry-leading capital returns, and a loyal membership base that is difficult to disintermediate, Costco remains a durable long-term compounder.
level3_translation.translation: 憑藉穩健的國際擴張、業界領先的資本回報，以及難以被取代的忠實會員基礎，好市多仍是一個具備長期複利成長能力的企業。

level3_translation.sentence: Costco Wholesale Corporation (NASDAQ:COST) is not on our list of 40 Most Popular Stocks Among Hedge Funds Heading Into 2026.
level3_translation.translation: 好市多（Costco Wholesale Corporation, NASDAQ:COST）並未列入我們『2026年對沖基金最受歡迎的40檔股票』清單中。

level3_translation.sentence: According to our database, 107 hedge fund portfolios held Costco Wholesale Corporation (NASDAQ:COST) at the end of the first quarter, up from 106 in the previous quarter.
level3_translation.translation: 根據我們的資料庫顯示，截至第一季末，共有107個對沖基金投資組合持有好市多（Costco Wholesale Corporation, NASDAQ:COST），較上一季的106個有所增加。

level3_translation.sentence: While we acknowledge the potential of Costco Wholesale Corporation (NASDAQ:COST) as an investment, we believe certain AI stocks offer greater upside potential and carry less downside risk.
level3_translation.translation: 儘管我們認可好市多（Costco Wholesale Corporation, NASDAQ:COST）作為一項投資的潛力，但我們認為某些AI股票能提供更大的上漲空間並承擔較低的下行風險。

level3_translation.sentence: If you're looking for an extremely undervalued AI stock that also stands to benefit significantly from Trump-era tariffs and the onshoring trend, see our free report on the best short-term AI stock.
level3_translation.translation: 如果您正在尋找一支極度被低估，且有望從川普時代關稅和產業回流趨勢中顯著受益的AI股票，請參閱我們關於最佳短期AI股票的免費報告。

level3_translation.sentence: In another article, we covered Costco Wholesale Corporation (NASDAQ:COST) and shared the list of best stocks to buy according to billionaire Richard Chilton.
level3_translation.translation: 在另一篇文章中，我們報導了好市多（Costco Wholesale Corporation, NASDAQ:COST），並分享了億萬富翁Richard Chilton推薦的最佳買入股票清單。

level3_translation.sentence: In addition, please check out our hedge fund investor letters Q1 2026 page for more investor letters from hedge funds and other leading investors.
level3_translation.translation: 此外，請查看我們的『對沖基金投資者信函2026年第一季』頁面，以獲取更多來自對沖基金和其他領先投資者的信函。

level3_translation.sentence: READ NEXT: 33 Stocks That Should Double in 3 Years and 15 Stocks That Will Make You Rich in 10 Years.
level3_translation.translation: 接下來閱讀：『3年內有望翻倍的33檔股票』以及『10年內讓你致富的15檔股票』。

english_professor_news.title: Honeywell Spinoff Solstice Inks $14.5 Billion Deal For 'Increased Exposure' To AI Boom

level1_blind.text: Honeywell Spinoff Solstice Inks $14.5 Billion Deal For 'Increased Exposure' To AI Boom

level2_keywords.meaning: 分拆公司、剝離公司。指母公司將其部分業務獨立出來，成立一家新的、獨立的公司。
level2_keywords.example: The conglomerate announced a spinoff of its semiconductor division to unlock shareholder value.

level2_keywords.meaning: 簽訂、簽署（合約或協議）。在商業新聞中常用來表示達成協議。
level2_keywords.example: The startup inks a multi-year partnership with a leading cloud provider.

level2_keywords.meaning: 交易、協議。指商業上達成的一項買賣、合作或併購等安排。
level2_keywords.example: The company is close to finalizing a major acquisition deal worth billions.

level2_keywords.meaning: 曝險、接觸、參與。在財經領域，通常指投資者或公司在某個市場、資產或產業中的參與程度，可能帶來風險或機會。
level2_keywords.example: Investors are seeking increased exposure to renewable energy stocks.

level2_keywords.meaning: AI熱潮、人工智慧榮景。指人工智慧技術快速發展並在各產業廣泛應用，帶動相關產業蓬勃發展的時期。
level2_keywords.example: The AI boom is driving unprecedented demand for high-performance computing chips.

english_professor_news.level2_context: 各位同學，這則新聞談到霍尼韋爾（Honeywell）旗下的分拆公司 Solstice，簽下了一筆非常大的交易，金額高達 145 億美元。這裡的『分拆公司』（spinoff）指的是母公司將其部分業務獨立出來，成立一家新公司。通常這樣做的目的是為了讓新公司能更專注於特定業務，或是釋放其潛在價值。而這筆交易的重點在於『增加對 AI 榮景的參與度』（Increased Exposure to AI Boom）。這反映了當前科技產業的熱門趨勢，也就是人工智慧（AI）的快速發展。許多公司都希望透過投資、併購或策略合作，來搭上這波 AI 浪潮，以期在未來市場中佔據有利位置並實現成長。這筆交易的規模也顯示了市場對 AI 相關投資的巨大胃口。

level3_translation.sentence: Honeywell Spinoff Solstice Inks $14.5 Billion Deal For 'Increased Exposure' To AI Boom
level3_translation.translation: 各位同學，這句話在財經界的意思是：霍尼韋爾（Honeywell）分拆出來的 Solstice 公司，簽下了一筆高達 145 億美元的交易，目的在於『提高對 AI 產業榮景的參與度』。

market_linker_insight.market_connection: 在全球資訊技術Industry中，AI和人工智能技術的進展對於最佳購買機會的發現和追蹤具有重要意義。根據最近的國際財經新聞報導，Best Buy和Apple因為全球記憶體短缺而面臨著價格上升，從而影響消費者購買行為。這種情況下，AI技術對於預測和分析消費者行為具有重要意義，可以幫助公司更好地了解消費者需求和偏好，从而做出更明智的購買決策。因此，對於最佳購買機會的發現和追蹤，AI技術的應用將成為未來的關鍵。
